---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Maneuvers and Judicial Scrutiny of Language Policy"
date: 2026-07-15T03:43:44.613386+00:00
summary: "The BJP seeks support for constitutional amendments as the Supreme Court reviews language policies and legislative debates intensify over national reforms"
run_time_ist: "9:13AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:13AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative and Constitutional Hurdles:</strong> The BJP is actively courting opposition leaders, including Sharad Pawar and DMK members, to secure support for pending constitutional amendment bills, even as a recent attempt to pass women’s reservation legislation in the Lok Sabha failed.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial Review of Language Policy:</strong> The Supreme Court has questioned the status of English as an indigenous language under the CBSE’s three-language policy, though it has declined to stay the mandate and assured teachers of potential reinstatement if they face dismissal.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>TMC Internal Instability:</strong> Reports suggest the BJP may be leveraging internal dissent within the TMC, with the Lok Sabha Speaker potentially recognizing a merger of rebel MPs with the NCPI, signaling a possible parliamentary collapse for the party.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxOeHNxT1VzV2Q0d2lSbVAyNFRIV2dQRjVnNkF6TDBKSUJoMTRLZnp0THNZaEw3d3dyM2ZYVXNjdzlWSmp5eTNiMzNfU0RrX0JhNEQ1SERNOHNxYzNfSFpoV2l0aERNZUY1emQ1SmlqLU03RVBXVWx2SmFkeE5QeEQ5UkotSGRWak0wOGs0WUJxTDBDUW02QVJFdkpHVVl4MmZTd2tuNkpEUzRJRXpuMzRrb2hn?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Uniform Civil Code and Electoral Reform:</strong> The Madhya Pradesh government is set to table a Uniform Civil Code bill on July 19, while the Joint Parliamentary Committee remains divided over the &#x27;One Nation, One Election&#x27; proposal, with the NDA in favor and the opposition in firm disagreement.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a></span></li>
</ul>

Radhakrishnan addresses National Youth Parliament in Nagpur, highlights role of youth in Developed India 2047 | Akashvani News - News On AIR</a> News On AIR</li>
